JUDGE JOSEPH A. DESMOND, K.LEE/CLERK, P.DOWLING/CSR 09:48AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. DAVID MENDEZ FOR THE PLTF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFT, MOSE KING. THE COURT RENDERS JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AND AGAINST THE DEFT ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KING, MOSES JR. (SUED AS MOSE) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 868 VALENCIA STREET #16, S.F. $1,666.60 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,666.60, LEASE FORFEITED
